findings.description: PascalCase class `W11AC02Form` appears in the s3 Action code example but is absent from s3's hints array. Per V4, PascalCase class names from content should be included in hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source Action class example: `W11AC02Form form = new W11AC02Form(); form.setBatchStatus(Batch.WAITING);` — W11AC02Form is a concrete class a user might search for when implementing the code-tag pattern.
